Machine learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence (AI) that involves using algorithms and statistical models to enable machines to learn from data, make decisions, and improve their performance on a specific task over time.

In machine learning, the goal is to train a model on a large dataset, where the model learns to predict the output for new, unseen data. The model can then be used to make predictions or decisions based on new input data.

Machine learning has many applications, such as image and speech recognition, natural language processing, recommendation systems, and autonomous vehicles. It is a powerful tool that can help us automate decision-making processes, improve the accuracy of predictions, and enable machines to work more efficiently and effectively.
